response.overview: Located in Liberty Square at the Magic Kingdom in Walt Disney World, The Hall of Presidents is a groundbreaking multimedia and Audio-Animatronic stage show. The 23-minute presentation features a historical film about the United States Constitution and the presidency, culminating in a roll call and performance by life-sized, incredibly lifelike animatronic figures of all U.S. Commanders in Chief.
response.tagline: The Presidents Will See You Now
response.title: The Hall Of Presidents
